## Feature Description
Describe the feature you'd like to see in TwitchLift's Twitch view bot.

## Use Case
How would this feature improve the viewer bot experience?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any additional information, screenshots, or references.
